analysis_result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE: No sonidegib dose-response / IC50 curve data present in MOESM10. Fig 5j sheet contains qPCR relative-expression values, not IC50 dose-response data.
discrepancy_analysis:
A. QUESTION & EXPECTED RESULT
   Question asks for the approximate fold difference in sonidegib IC50 between S462TY and STS-26T cell lines, per Fig 5k dose-response curves.
   Reported result (from paper): Twofold lower IC50 in S462TY compared to STS-26T.
   Model result: DATA_UNAVAILABLE - no IC50 dose-response data deposited in MOESM10 source data; the Fig 5j sheet contains qPCR relative-expression values, not IC50 dose-response curves.

B. COMPARISON
   The reported value (twofold lower IC50 in S462TY) cannot be directly reproduced because the underlying dose-response curve data for Fig 5k were not deposited in the source data file (MOESM10). The question references 'Fig 5k IC50 curves (MOESM10 Fig 5j source data)', but the Fig 5j sheet of MOESM10 contains qPCR relative-expression data (likely for the GLI1/GLI2/PTCH1 Hedgehog pathway transcripts shown in an adjacent panel), not the raw dose-response (cell viability vs. drug concentration) measurements needed to fit IC50 values.

C. ROOT-CAUSE INVESTIGATION
   The discrepancy is not due to a computational or analytic error in the model's reproduction. The model correctly inspected the available source data and determined that the dose-response curve data underlying Fig 5k were not deposited. This is a MISSING_DATA_HANDLING situation: the authors reported an IC50 fold-difference in the main text/figure but did not include the underlying dose-response points in their deposited source data. Without the x-y viability data, a four-parameter logistic fit cannot be performed to derive IC50 values for either cell line.

D. MAGNITUDE
   Cannot be computed quantitatively because the model has no numeric IC50 to compare against the paper's reported twofold.

E. CLASSIFICATION
   7:MISSING_DATA_HANDLING - the source data file does not contain the dose-response measurements required to reproduce the reported IC50 fold difference.

F. PROPOSED FIX
   Authors should deposit the sonidegib dose-response (concentration x viability) data for S462TY and STS-26T (and any other cell lines tested) as a supplementary source-data sheet. Alternatively, the reproducer would need access to the original viability assay raw data to independently fit IC50 values via 4PL nonlinear regression.

G. CONFIDENCE
   MEDIUM - the model's inspection of MOESM10 indicates the dose-response data are absent from that particular source data file. It is possible the IC50 dose-response data were deposited in a different supplementary file not inspected, but based on the question prompt directing the reproducer to 'MOESM10 Fig 5j source data', the expectation was that the data would be there, and they are not.
proposed_fix: Deposit the raw sonidegib dose-response (drug concentration vs. cell viability) data for S462TY and STS-26T as a supplementary source-data sheet so IC50 values can be independently fit via 4PL nonlinear regression and the reported twofold difference can be verified.
